matrixLidarDistanceSensor.laserrangingSe: Initialize the I2C address [ADDRESS] of the laserranging sensor in [MATRIX]
matrixLidarDistanceSensor.setObstacleDis: Customize the obstacle avoidance distance to [DISTANCE] (mm)
matrixLidarDistanceSensor.obstacleSugges: Direction indication in obstacle avoidance mode
matrixLidarDistanceSensor.getObstacleDis: Distance detection in obstacle avoidance mode [SIDE] (mm)
matrixLidarDistanceSensor.matrixPointOut: [ADDRESS] Measure the distance of the specified point in matrix mode x: [X] y: [Y] (mm)
